MINI MINUTES: Judge Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Simply Urban LLC is present. Represented by Eric Neplokh.
Defendants Justin Martinelli and David Miller are present.
Attorney M. Lance Kennix representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of APR-29-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
